why_it_matters: The note already documents a social needs assessment; adding infrequent social contact and stress level enriches geriatric care but does not change management for this visit.
Documenting removal of a duplicate/outdated metoprolol dose is essential to prevent inadvertent double beta-blocker dosing and consequent bradycardia or hypotension.
Recording counseling on the periodontal–cardiovascular link supports the dental referral and patient education but has limited immediate clinical impact.
